description_long: This is a single, medium-sized brown chicken egg with a smooth, slightly glossy surface and a uniform color throughout. The egg has an oval, slightly asymmetrical shape, with one end more rounded and the other more tapered. Its surface shows subtle natural texturing, giving it a realistic appearance, but no visible cracks or blemishes. The color is a warm, light brown, typical of many farm-fresh eggs. The shell appears hard and unbroken, enclosing the liquid egg white and yolk inside. There are no visible markings, patterns, or decorations on the exterior.
description: A smooth, light brown chicken egg with a hard shell and a natural, slightly glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded, broad end of the brown egg with a smooth, unblemished surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the egg's oval profile and the gentle taper toward the top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the rounded end and consistent brown color.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the oval shape and smooth, glossy brown shell.
attribute_orientation: upright with the broader end at the bottom and the pointed end at the top
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as part of a breakfast setting or during food preparation in a kitchen.
